puzzle.hint: A blessed plant mentioned beside Mount Sinai, source of oil and condiment for those who eat
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَشَجَرَةًۭ تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَآءَ تَنۢبُتُ بِٱلدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍۢ لِّلْـَٔاكِلِينَ
puzzle.verse: 23:20 - And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food [i.e., olives] for those who eat.
